title_de: Technologien im Sport IV (ehemals Technologien im Sport)
topic_tags: sports technology; sports equipment; materials
competencies: Investigate advanced sports-technology research topics; Evaluate cutting-edge materials and methods in sports equipment; Assess innovations in sports technology critically; Present specialized sports topics in a seminar
description_en: An advanced seminar on selected research topics in sports technology and the engineering of sports devices.

title_de: Technologien zum Fügen, Beschichten und zur Montage
topic_tags: joining; coating; assembly
competencies: Assess possibilities and limits of joining, coating, and assembly technologies; Select application-optimized processes and technologies; Apply arc, electron-beam, laser, and hybrid joining technologies; Use thermal spraying and innovative coating processes
description_en: A course on technologies for joining, coating, and assembly, covering welding, thermal spraying, additive joining, and application-optimized process selection.

title_de: Technologien zum Urformen, Umformen und Trennen
topic_tags: forming; machining; manufacturing processes
competencies: Name and describe primary shaping, forming, and machining processes; Assess possibilities and limits of these manufacturing technologies; Select manufacturing processes for exemplary applications; Apply casting, powder-metallurgical, additive, forming, and cutting methods
description_en: A course on technologies for primary shaping, forming, and machining, covering casting, powder metallurgy, additive, forming, and cutting processes.

topic_tags: tribology; friction and wear; product optimization
competencies: Analyze and identify friction and wear problems and their mechanisms; Optimize tribologically loaded components and tribosystems; Assess conditions for energy-efficient and sustainable tribosystem design; Use software and testing equipment to evaluate tribosystems
description_en: A course on tribological product optimization, covering friction, wear, lubrication, coatings, and energy-efficient design of tribosystems.

topic_tags: corporate management; business planning; strategy
competencies: Apply strategic corporate management and planning methods; Analyze the strategic environment using SWOT, PESTEL, and scenario techniques; Develop existing and new business models; Create a detailed business plan from idea to implementation
description_en: A course on strategic business planning and corporate management, covering strategy analysis, business model development, and Industry 4.0 project implementation.

topic_tags: combustion engine; powertrain; thermodynamics
competencies: Understand the fundamentals of internal combustion engine design; Analyze thermodynamics and working processes of reciprocating engines; Compare spark-ignition and diesel engines and their combustion; Assess exhaust emissions, aftertreatment, and future engine trends
description_en: A course on internal combustion engines, covering reciprocating machine fundamentals, thermodynamics, combustion, emissions, and future powertrain developments.

topic_tags: gear technology; manufacturing; metrology
competencies: Discuss gearing problems for involute spur gears using technical terminology; Understand the gear manufacturing process from roughing to finishing; Select and apply measuring devices for gear inspection; Interpret gear measurement and deviation results
description_en: A course on gear technology, covering the geometry, manufacturing, and metrological inspection of involute spur gears and gear pairs.

topic_tags: vibro-acoustics; noise; structural vibration
competencies: Explain sound radiation and transmission of vibrating structures; Apply fundamentals of technical acoustics and wave propagation in solids; Measure vibro-acoustic phenomena experimentally; Apply methods to actively reduce radiated noise
description_en: A course with lab exercises on vibro-acoustics, covering sound radiation and transmission of structures, measurement methods, and active noise reduction.

topic_tags: visualization; scientific visualization; rendering
competencies: Apply scientific and information visualization techniques; Design effective visual representations of data; Implement visualization pipelines and rendering methods; Evaluate and interpret visualizations critically
description_en: A course on data and scientific visualization covering techniques for creating effective visual representations of data.

topic_tags: hydrogen; fuel cell; energy transition
competencies: Analyze requirements of hydrogen as an alternative fuel; Assess sustainability potential and safety standards for hydrogen; Evaluate hydrogen production, storage, distribution, and infrastructure; Understand hydrogen combustion engines and fuel-cell drive systems
description_en: A course on hydrogen technology and hydrogen drives, covering production, storage, safety, life-cycle assessment, combustion engines, and fuel-cell systems.

topic_tags: welding metallurgy; weldability; materials
competencies: Assess the weldability of ferrous and non-ferrous metals; Understand material changes in the heat-affected zone and weld metal; Select weld fillers and auxiliary materials for different materials; Determine pre- and post-weld heat treatment measures
description_en: A course on materials and welding, covering the weldability of metals, heat-affected zone changes, weld fillers, and required heat treatments.

topic_tags: automotive materials; lightweight; material selection
competencies: Survey materials and their processing for automotive applications; Use material characteristics for material selection; Explain manufacturing possibilities and limits for automotive materials; Assess lightweight, safety, and e-mobility material concepts
description_en: A course on materials and processes in automotive production, covering steels, alloys, composites, lightweight concepts, and forming and joining technologies.

topic_tags: materials processing; microstructure; manufacturing
competencies: Link forming, casting, and thermal processes to material properties; Understand metal synthesis via melting, casting, and powder metallurgy; Analyze microstructure-changing processes and phase transformations; Relate synthesis processes to properties of ceramics, polymers, and composites
description_en: A course on materials processing technology, linking primary shaping, forming, and thermal treatment to the microstructural and mechanical properties of materials.

topic_tags: machine tool programming; cnc; machining
competencies: Name and describe machine tool programming methods for machining; Explain and assess specifics of programming for machining processes; Design simple machine tool programs; Apply computer-based controls and manual and automated programming
description_en: A course on machine tool programming for machining processes, covering computer-based controls and manual and automated program creation.

topic_tags: work system planning; ergonomics; factory planning
competencies: Analyze and synthesize work systems holistically; Plan and design ergonomic, human-centred workplaces; Apply assessment methods for work environment factors; Prepare and use planning-relevant data for factory planning; Optimize human-machine task allocation
description_en: Methods for planning and designing ergonomic work systems within factory planning, focusing on human-centred work conditions and human-machine allocation.

topic_tags: heat treatment; microstructure; materials
competencies: Understand and apply the fundamentals of heat treatment; Distinguish heat treatment processes and their application areas; Describe material microstructures and properties after heat treatment; Recognize and avoid defects and distortions during heat treatment
description_en: A course on thermal treatment of materials, covering hardening processes, phase transformations, microstructure-property effects, and defect avoidance.

topic_tags: time management; work study; production optimization
competencies: Determine time data efficiently for industrial time management; Optimize production systems from a time-economy perspective; Analyze and synthesize work sequences using time-structuring schemes; Apply time-study methods such as predetermined motion time systems
description_en: A course on time management and data collection, teaching efficient time-data acquisition and time-economy optimization of production systems.
